title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.220 - Authority to appropriate money
text:
305.220.  Authority to appropriate money. — The local authorities of a city, including cities under special charter, village, town or county to which sections 305.170 to 305.220 are applicable having power to appropriate money therein may annually appropriate a sum sufficient to carry out the provisions of sections 305.170 to 305.220.
(RSMo 1939 § 15127) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13926
